coat_colors: all colors except chocolate or liver

description.overview: Despite its name, the Tibetan Terrier is not a terrier but a herding breed kept as good luck charms in Tibet.
description.temperament: TTs are affectionate, clever, and adaptable. They bond closely with family.
description.health: Prone to hip dysplasia, eye problems, and some neurological conditions.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Enjoy walks and playtime.

verdict.summary: Gentle, devoted 'good luck' dogs from Tibet. Tibetan Terriers are affectionate family companions but require extensive grooming.
